rows.questionAnswered: How many additional deaths might occur on a nationally extreme heat day?
rows.notAmeasureOf: registered deaths or medically confirmed heatstroke deaths
rows.articleUse: Core disputed estimate; quote only as a modelled scenario

rows.questionAnswered: How many additional deaths might occur across a five-day severe heatwave?
rows.notAmeasureOf: registered deaths or medically confirmed heatstroke deaths
rows.articleUse: Shows scale sensitivity when heat exposure persists

rows.questionAnswered: How many extreme-temperature disaster deaths were reported for international disaster accounting?
rows.verificationStatus: OWID Grapher CSV snapshotted and parsed locally

rows.questionAnswered: What is the reported extreme-temperature disaster-death total across recent non-missing years?
rows.articleUse: Shows how small reported-disaster totals are relative to large excess-mortality scenarios
rows.verificationStatus: OWID Grapher CSV snapshotted and parsed locally

rows.questionAnswered: How many deaths were administratively recorded as heat/sunstroke under accidental deaths?
rows.articleUse: Official Indian administrative count, with narrow cause-label caveat
rows.verificationStatus: secondary report of official NCRB report; primary table still to extract

rows.questionAnswered: How many heatwave deaths were compiled in IMD's meteorological disaster-event report?
rows.notAmeasureOf: medical death registration or all-cause excess mortality
rows.articleUse: Best locally parsed official disaster-event death anchor
rows.verificationStatus: official PDF parsed locally; Table 2, Table 7, Table 22 and state/month totals reconcile

rows.questionAnswered: How many heatstroke deaths were confirmed in the surveillance system by that public-reporting cutoff?
rows.notAmeasureOf: all heat-attributable deaths, deaths outside surveillance, or excess mortality
rows.verificationStatus: secondary policy article; NCDC aggregate feed not public in this ingest

rows.questionAnswered: How many heatstroke deaths were cited in parliamentary/public reporting up to this cutoff?
rows.notAmeasureOf: all heat-attributable deaths or a full-year excess-mortality estimate
rows.articleUse: Shows cutoff and reporting-channel sensitivity within surveillance figures
rows.verificationStatus: secondary wire report; primary Lok Sabha answer still to extract

metadata.note: Comparison table for public article. Rows are intentionally not directly comparable; questionAnswered and notAmeasureOf define each row's boundary.
